title: Mythrais
description: Mythrais is an architectural addon mod that provides lots of decoration blocks such as windows, roofs, arches, Tudor beams, pillars and wall details for making your medieval and fantasy builds more buildy! Download my 32x resourcepack from my Patreon.
body:
Mythrais is an architectural addon mod that provides hundreds of decoration blocks such as windows, roofs, arches, Tudor beams, pillars, battlements and wall details for making your medieval and fantasy builds more buildy!

PLEASE!!!! MAKE BACKUPS OF YOUR WORLDS BEFORE UPDATING ANY MODS <3

CREATIVE -

For those of you playing in Creative using Conquest Refabricated and other deco mods, such as Victory Mod, my 32x resource pack is linked below. 

32X RESOURCEPACK TO COMPLIMENT VICTORY MOD & CR ETC IS AVAILABLE ON MY PATREON!  

Creative players can use the Mythrais Adamantium Staff, debug stick or the Worldedit /tool cycler to access all the additional block shape variations and colours for each block. **Most blocks have some available variation to extend their uses.

SURVIVAL - 

All Mythrais's blocks have loot tables and recipes, and in survival mode can be crafted in the stonecutter by inputting Mythrais's base resources as follows -

- minecraft dark oak log x1 --> refined dark oak beam x4 --> mythrais wood blocks
- minecraft oak log x1 --> refined oak beam x4 --> mythrais wood blocks
- minecraft spruce log x1 --> refined spruce beam x4 --> mythrais wood blocks
- minecraft birch log x1 --> refined birch beam x4 --> mythrais wood blocks
- minecraft stone x1 --> refined stone x1 --> mythrais stone blocks 
- minecraft smooth stone x1 --> refined smooth stone x4 --> mythrais stone blocks
- minecraft chiseled stone bricks x1 --> refined carved stone x4 --> mythrais stone blocks
- minecraft stone bricks x1 --> refined stone bricks x4 --> mythrais stone brick blocks
- minecraft red terracotta x1 --> refined red terracotta  x4 --> mythrais 67-degree roofs
- minecraft light-gray terracotta x1 --> refined light-gray terracotta x4 -> mythrais 22-degree roofs
- minecraft white terracotta -> refined white terracotta x4 -> mythrais 45-degree roofs
- minecraft terracotta x1 --> refined terracotta -> mythrais walls and floors etc

Crafting recipes listed here - https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xeWqBR8L0L5vqHGY_HOSDgsnq9-KycHB5qT-lqd1QEY/edit?usp=sharing
 
Survival players can craft the Mythrais Adamantium Staff with 1 diamond to shift and right-click to change block variations, then right-click again to scroll through the amount - eg, shape, facing, type, colour, age, layer.

 

Bug Reporting

I am extremely grateful to anybody who takes the time to report bugs or issues. In the long run, such reports help me improve the mod for everyone's benefit. In all cases, please report anything like this directly to my bug reporting channel on my Discord. This is so I can track and update them as necessary. If you do not wish to join my Discord, you can also DM me with bug reports, which will be added on your behalf, but you will not get updates about any other issues reported.

 

Block and update Suggestions

Members of my Patreon can also make block suggestions for future updates from Tier 2 and will get early access to those updates, including my 32x resourcepack.

Server Owners - there is a tier 3 option for you to access the 32x resourcepack on behalf of your players if you want to add Mythrais in 32x textures to your server.

 

Contacts Discord - https://discord.gg/5kH9AfeRD3 Transcendent Visions

Patreon - https://www.patreon.com/c/xElandriax

Credits - 
Jaggysnake92 - additional block models and textures
TheUnknownDad - coding advice/support & mod mentorship & neoforge 1.21.1 port
